endpoints.name: GET /products
endpoints.description: Lists a collection of products in the specified service instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /products/{productId}
endpoints.description: Gets the details of the product specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: PUT /products/{productId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /products/{productId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /products/{productId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: GET /products/{productId}/apis
endpoints.description: Lists a collection of the APIs associated with a product.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: PUT /products/{productId}/apis/{apiId}
endpoints.description: Adds an API to the specified product.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{APIID}} with a real apiid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /products/{productId}/apis/{apiId}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified API from the specified product.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{APIID}} with a real apiid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: GET /products/{productId}/groups
endpoints.description: Lists the collection of developer groups associated with the specified product.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: PUT /products/{productId}/groups/{groupId}
endpoints.description: Adds the association between the specified developer group with the specified product.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{GROUPID}} with a real groupid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /products/{productId}/groups/{groupId}
endpoints.description: Deletes the association between the specified group and product.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{GROUPID}} with a real groupid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: GET /products/{productId}/policies
endpoints.description: Get the policy configuration at the Product level.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: GET /products/{productId}/policies/{policyId}
endpoints.description: Get the policy configuration at the Product level.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{POLICYID}} with a real policyid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: PUT /products/{productId}/policies/{policyId}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates policy configuration for the Product.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{POLICYID}} with a real policyid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /products/{productId}/policies/{policyId}
endpoints.description: Deletes the policy configuration at the Product.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{POLICYID}} with a real policyid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: GET /products/{productId}/subscriptions
endpoints.description: Lists the collection of subscriptions to the specified product.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.
